title: Syntholene Secures 20 Megawatt Energy Agreement for Worldâ€™s First Geothermally-Powered Synthetic Sustainable Aviation Fuel (eSAF) Commercial Demonstration Facility
content: SYNTHOLENE ENERGY CORP has secured a dedicated geothermal energy resource sufficient to deploy the worldâ€™s first geothermally-powered synthetic sustainable aviation fuel (eSAF) plant module. The signing of a binding agreement for up to 20 megawatts of electrical energy (or thermal equivalent) marks a key step toward the companyâ€™s goal of delivering clean synthetic fuels at lower cost than fossil fuels, for the first time.
author: Analysts Account
